positive: A cute, maximalist sticker-style illustration of a fantastical coffee cup character (anthropomorphic mug) surrounded by steaming latte art and pastry items. Pop art style, bold outlines, vibrant complementary colors (mustard yellow, teal, burnt orange), kawaii aesthetic, clean vector art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, muted colors, realistic texture
